req.title: Update patient (audit)
req.statement: A clinician shall update patient demographics; historical versions must be preserved. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

# Patient Demographics Update - Pytest Test Suite

## Project Structure

```
tests/
├── conftest.py
├── models/
│   └── patient.py
├── services/
│   ├── patient_service.py
│   └── audit_service.py
├── test_patient_demographics_update.py
├── test_audit_events.py
├── test_version_history.py
└── test_end_to_end.py
```

---

## conftest.py

```python
"""
Shared fixtures and configuration for patient demographics test suite.
Requirement: Clinician updates patient demographics; historical versions
             must be preserved. AuditEvent emitted for every operation.
"""

import pytest
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from typing import Generator

from models.patient import (
    Patient,
    PatientDemographics,
    PatientVersion,
    AuditEvent,
    AuditEventType,
    OperationOutcome,
)
from services.patient_service import PatientService
from services.audit_service import AuditService


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Constants
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

CLINICIAN_ID = "clinician-001"
CLINICIAN_NAME = "Dr. Jane Smith"
PATIENT_ID = "patient-abc-123"

BASELINE_DEMOGRAPHICS = PatientDemographics(
    given_name="John",
    family_name="Doe",
    birth_date="1985-03-15",
    gender="male",
    phone="555-0100",
    email="john.doe@example.com",
    address="123 Main St, Springfield, IL 62701",
    marital_status="single",
    language="en",
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# In-memory stores (reset between tests)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@pytest.fixture()
def patient_store() -> dict:
    """Isolated in-memory patient store."""
    return {}


@pytest.fixture()
def version_store() -> dict:
    """Isolated in-memory version store keyed by patient_id."""
    return {}


@pytest.fixture()
def audit_store() -> list:
    """Isolated in-memory audit event store."""
    return []


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Service fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@pytest.fixture()
def audit_service(audit_store: list) -> AuditService:
    """AuditService backed by the in-memory audit store."""
    return AuditService(store=audit_store)


@pytest.fixture()
def patient_service(
    patient_store: dict,
    version_store: dict,
    audit_service: AuditService,
) -> PatientService:
    """PatientService wired to in-memory stores."""
    return PatientService(
        patient_store=patient_store,
        version_store=version_store,
        audit_service=audit_service,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pre-populated patient fixture
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@pytest.fixture()
def existing_patient(patient_service: PatientService) -> Patient:
    """A patient already registered in the system with baseline demographics."""
    patient = patient_service.create_patient(
        patient_id=PATIENT_ID,
        demographics=BASELINE_DEMOGRAPHICS,
        clinician_id=CLINICIAN_ID,
        clinician_name=CLINICIAN_NAME,
    )
    return patient

# Helpers available to all tests
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
